commit.message:
8379347: clarify expected behavior for testers

This is in response to:
https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/30096#pullrequestreview-4018238446

8379347: use text block

This is in response to:
https://github.com/openjdk/jdk/pull/30096/changes#r2998420677

8379347: give toggle buttons subrole

If a button uses Swing's AccessibleRole.TOGGLE_BUTTON, then as far as Apple's UI is concerned: it should have a role of NSAccessibilityCheckBoxRole and a subrole of NSAccessibilityToggleSubrole
